About the GRE

GRE or Graduate Record Examination is a standardised test conducted by ETS (Educational Testing Service) across many countries for candidates aspiring to apply for post-graduate programs and doctoral programs in the US. Generally used by universities in the US, GRE is also accepted at top universities in UK and in other countries, for benchmarking student applications.

Considering that the universities receive applications from students across the globe with varied educational experiences and grading methodologies, a GRE score is used as a common yardstick to evaluate these applications. Hence, it is necessary to achieve the best GRE score possible.

GRE has 3 main parts - Quantitative reasoning (2 sections), Verbal reasoning (2 sections) and Analytical Writing Assessment (1 essay). Click here for more information about the GRE.

GRE Prep with Jamboree

We teach exactly what you need to know for your GRE exam preparation - nothing more, nothing less. We don’t waste your time teaching you things you are not tested for on the exam – instead, we make sure you have a comprehensive understanding of every topic on the syllabus for your GRE preparation.

We have more than 300 of the best teachers for GRE preparation in the industry, and a standardised teaching methodology is followed across all 29 Jamboree centres in India and Nepal in our GRE prep classes.

Schedule as many doubt-clearing sessions with faculty as you need, from 7 AM to midnight every day. We want to make sure you have all your concepts down to a T, and we’ll work with you until you are confident in your GRE study prep.

At Jamboree, we have meticulously developed study material that solidifies your understanding of fundamental concepts, and then trains you to tackle advanced questions. That said, the ETS® official guides are always at the forefront of GRE prep at Jamboree. We also have GRE prep apps with GRE courses available for on-the-go learning.

Our AI-powered performance reports come with advanced analytics and comparative analytics to benchmark with your peers, such as:

  • Score predictor
  • Performance matrix
  • Accuracy chart
  • Average answer duration
  • Section-wise statistics

Our algorithm learns your answering patterns and gives you detailed performance insights, so you have a better understanding of your GRE exam prep progress, and identify focus areas to work on and that helps build a customized GRE roadmap.

Our online training portal simulates actual testing software, so you can get used to the program and be comfortable navigating it ahead of your GRE, through timed, full-length mock tests and quizzes, as well as sectional tests.

HD concept videos are available for your reference whenever you need them. Missed the explanation of a concept? Need to revise a particular type of question? Our HD videos help you revise and polish your topics and your GRE study course outside of the classroom, whenever you need to.

At Jamboree, our students always come first. We offer online, offline, and hybrid training modes to suit your schedule and convenience.

Choose from 4 of the best GRE test prep courses:

  • Classroom: In-person mentor attention and peer learning
  • Online: Classroom experience from the comfort of your home
  • Self-paced: Exam prep at your own pace, in your own space
  • Private tutoring: Personalised test prep with maximum one-on-one attention

We ensure our batch sizes are small, so that each of our students gets the attention they deserve. We are happy to create a customised learning experience for you based on your specific needs. If needed, you can club together the best GRE preparation modes to create a schedule that works for you. Still confused which prep mode to choose?

Guaranteed score improvement: With Jamboree, you will see a guaranteed improvement in your GRE score. Get:

  • Personal attention

    100+ hours of free sessions on syllabus basics, question discussions, admissions information, and exam strategies, The flexibility to switch between GRE preparation modes as per your needs

  • Highest scores in the industry: Jamboree has the highest GRE scores in the industry year after year and is proud to have helped lakhs of students achieve their goals.

Why Choose Jamboree for GRE Test Prep?

Best GRE coaching delivering the highest number of 320+ GRE scorers since 1993

Smart Analytics help you track and evaluate your GRE preparation online

Flexibility to move between online and offline mode of learning as per your convenience & availability

Sectional & full-length GRE practice tests to maximise speed and accuracy

GRE coaching and mentoring by the best and most experienced faculty

Personalised attention through unlimited doubt-clearing sessions & targeted GRE study plan

GRE - Jamboree Learning Management System

Experience the LMS - Free Trial Access

Unlock your full potential with our free trial - no strings attached

  • 35+ HD Pre-Recorded Videos
  • Intro, 1 Quant module, 1 Verbal module
  • 200+ Practice Questions across Practice & Sectional tests (10 tests in total)
  • 1 Quantitative, 1 Data Interpretation, 6 Verbal topic wise practice, 1 Quant sectional test, 1 Verbal sectional test
  • Detailed AI-Driven Analysis
  • Vocabulary Tool, App

Dashboard – Your Command Center

  • Start every session with a bird’s eye view of your GRE prep

  • Access everything: Learn, Practice, Test, Support

Classes Tab - Plan, Attend, Catch Up

  • View upcoming classes and join live sessions

  • Access recordings if you miss a class (for Live Online students)

Smart Analytics - Know Yourself Better

  • In-depth exercise and topic-level analysis

  • AI-generated strengths, weaknesses & perceived difficulty to help prioritize effort

AI - Powered Custom Practice

  • Custom quizzes to target topics and difficulty level of your choice

  • Weekly AI-generated quizzes based on your performance

GRE Prep Modes

Pick the GRE preparation mode that works best for you

At Jamboree we believe that every individual has their own learning styles and requirements when it comes to GRE preparation. We offer four different GRE prep modes when it comes to GRE coaching and each mode is designed in a way that helps students to achieve their target GRE score. The 4 modes are online, offline, and hybrid training modes and it can be picked as your convenience.

  • GRE Classroom
    Coaching
  • GRE Online
    Coaching
  • GRE Self-Paced Online Coaching
  • GRE Private
    Tutoring

GRE Classroom
Coaching Hybrid

Structured GRE classroom prep under the guidance and mentorship of faculty. Ensures high accountability and in-depth understanding of concepts 
  • Comprehensive GRE prep with 48 hours (24 classes) of classroom training by experienced GRE tutors 
  • 7 full-length GRE mock tests and 15 sectional tests 
  • GRE study material, Vocabulary app and webinars (foundation and advanced)
  • Unlimited doubt-clearing sessions from 7 AM to midnight every day
Know More

GRE Online
Coaching Online

GRE online prep is a comprehensive classroom program with live classes conducted by faculty. Best suited for students who want the best of classes but have difficulty in travelling.
  • 48 hours (24 classes) of GRE online training from anywhere.
  • 7 full-length GRE practice tests and test review with GRE teachers
  • Sectional tests and topic-wise exercises
  • Comprehensive GRE books to cover all areas of learning and practice
  • Unlimited doubt-clearing sessions from 7 AM to midnight every day
Know More

GRE Self-Paced Online Coaching Self-Paced Online

GRE Self-paced program consists of detailed concept videos and practice exercises that the student can work with at their own pace. Best suited for highly motivated students who keep track of their performance and regularity.
  • 48 hours of pre-recorded HD classroom videos 
  • 7-full length GRE mock tests
  • Sectional tests and topic-wise exercises
  • GRE study material available on the student portal
  • 5 hours of one-on-one doubt-clearing sessions with GRE tutor
Know More

GRE Private
Tutoring Hybrid

GRE tutor for personalized GRE preparation based on individual requirements. This is best suited for students who have unpredictable schedules or need personalized attention in certain topics or retest takers wanting to improve their GRE scores in a certain area.
  • 40 hours of one-on-one classes over 3 months with the best GRE tutors in India
  • Student GRE portal access for 1-year for tests and practice with advanced analytics
  • Customized GRE roadmap to achieve best GRE score possible
  • 7 full-length GRE mock tests, 15 sectional tests and additional topic-wise exercises
  • Comprehensive GRE books that covers learning and practice
Know More

Jamboree’s GRE Coaching

Designed To Help Your GRE Prep In 3 Key Areas

  • Concepts

  • Accuracy & Speed

  • Stamina & Strategy

GRE courses by our expert faculty on the concepts tested on the exam

Our GRE coaching teaches you exactly what you need to ace the GRE prep- nothing more, nothing less

GRE test prep with topic-based exercises to help gain mastery of concepts

Quickly revise the rules that you have studied in your GRE classes

Improve speed and accuracy with practice tests and solutions

Unlimited doubt clearing sessions help you improve the weak areas of your GRE course

Strategize your GRE prep journey with customised study plans

Sectional tests & free webinars for an effective GRE test prep

Full-length tests just like the actual GRE test

GRE Coaching Centers

Since 1993, we have been steadily expanding our presence across India and Nepal, in an effort to reach students from all across and help them achieve their dreams of studying at premier institutions around the world. Begin your GRE prep journey with Jamboree today and achieve your target GRE score.

We’re everywhere – find GRE prep classes near you:

"There is a huge difference between finishing one's "job" and taking a student's responsibility. "There is a huge difference between finishing one's "job" and taking a student's responsibility. I constantly pestered Jamboree with my doubts, but they took care of it with the same composure & concern. They even allowed me to attend some classes after my registration had expired, considering some problems I had to go through. I am grateful to the faculty & staff at Jamboree for my score. I owe it all to them."

Arjun Shah

GRE Score 340

"I signed up for coaching at Jamboree, and it helped me manage my time and balance my studies. Also, the reference material provided by my coaching center was very helpful."

Arush Gupta

GRE Score 338

"I'm really thankful to you for all your efforts, and most importantly, the patience Jamboree's faculty has shown with me!"

Anubhav Jain

GRE Score 337

"I did the 10-week course from Jamboree for GRE preparation and was impressed by the faculty and study material they provide. I ended up scoring 337/340 and I couldn't have done it without them."

Free GRE Prep Resources

GRE Quiz

Take this short GRE quiz to test your GRE online prep

GRE Syllabus Download

Download the GRE syllabus now and get a head start on your GRE test prep

GRE Sample Test

Find out how GRE-ready you are with this GRE sample test online

FAQs: GRE Preparation

GRE is a standardised test used by top universities across the USA  and some other countries to test applicants for their academic readiness of a graduate program.

The GRE exam score is a requirement for admission to graduate programs of several top universities across the world. With the right GRE preparation, a good GRE score gives you an edge over other applicants in the application pool.

ETS conducts two types of GRE exams - The GRE General Test, which is used as the primary criteria for your admission into any master’s program. And the GRE Subject Tests, which are taken by students choosing to specialise in Chemistry, Mathematics, Physics, and Psychology.

Anyone can take the GRE. ETS has specified no age limit or minimum qualification to take the GRE. In total honesty, there will be a range of eligibility criteria set by the universities that accept GRE scores.

The GRE exam fee in India is priced at INR 22550.

There are no specific dates announced for the GRE, you can practically take the test whenever you feel your GRE prep is on point. There is also no lifetime limit on the number of times you can take the GRE exam, but you can only take five attempts within any continuous rolling 12-month period.

If you have to retake the GRE exam due to any reason, you will have to wait for a minimum of 21 days before you can take your next attempt. This is just ETS's way of saying that you should take some time to really outdo your last GRE score with a more robust GRE prep, and we agree!


 

Yes, ETS allows you to reschedule your GRE exam. Here is a step-by-step guide to rescheduling the GRE exam - How To Reschedule GRE Exam at Home? (jamboreeindia.com)

GRE is a 1 hours and 58 minutes exam. Your GRE prep also prepares you to sit for this long exam. Here’s the breakdown of the duration of the test and sections on the GRE exam:

SECTION

QUESTIONS

TIME IN MINUTES

Analytical Writing

1 Essay Task

30

Verbal Reasoning

2 Sections (27 Questions)

41

Quantitative Reasoning

2 Sections (27 Questions)

47

The GRE exam is changing from September 22, 2023. Here's everything you need to know about the new GRE exam duration, questions, scoring and more- New GRE Exam.

GRE is a 1 hours and 58 minutes exam. Your GRE prep also prepares you to sit for this long exam. Here’s the breakdown of the duration of the test and sections on the GRE exam:

SECTION

QUESTIONS

TIME IN MINUTES

Analytical Writing

1 Essay Task

30

Verbal Reasoning

2 Sections (27 Questions)

41

Quantitative Reasoning

2 Sections (27 Questions)

47

The GRE exam is changing from September 22, 2023. Here's everything you need to know about the new GRE exam duration, questions, scoring and more- New GRE Exam.

The highest possible score on the GRE is 340, and the Quantitative and Verbal Sections make up for 170 points each. The Analytical Writing Section, however, is scored on an independent scale where you can get a score from 0 to 6, with 6 being the highest and 0 being the lowest.


 

If you are opting for online GRE preparation, you can choose from one of the best GRE online coaching options and enrol in a GRE course online that teaches you through live classes. Sign up for an online GRE preparation demo class here.

Depending on an individual student’s schedule and time dedication, GRE prep can take anywhere from 2-6 months. You can opt for GRE preparation online or training in GRE coaching centres. For more personalised insights on your GRE prep, get in touch with our counsellor. Book a free expert session now!

GRE’s Analytical Writing section doesn’t assess specific content knowledge rather, it tests your analytical writing skills through different tasks. These writing tasks test your ability to articulate and evaluate complex ideas while simultaneously judging your ability to sustain a focused and coherent discussion.

Jamboree's Google Rating4.710K+ Reviews

Ananya Patil

Jamboree was one of the major reasons I could ace the SAT. The teachers are patient and dedicated, and go out of their way to solve doubts and arrange classes. Centre level mock tests were the final mile before giving the actual exam. I am extremely grateful to Jamboree for playing a huge role in paving my path towards a bright future.

Arjun Mahajan

I joined Jamboree after my first attempt at GMAT, with a score of 680. My aim was to break the 700 mark. The faculty here was really supportive of my time constraints as i had to take my second attempt in 1.5 months. The verbal content and tips were extremely helpful and I improved my timing and accuracy drastically. The quant material was very good and the faculty member always clarified the concepts and dived into detail where necessary. Post the classes, I was given ample amount of personal sessions. I cleared all my doubts within 2 weeks of classes. Due to their efforts and focus, I was able to finish my preparation for the second attempt in 50 days and achieved a 710 score the second time around. I am thankful to jamboree for understanding the urgency in my case and will definitely recommend them to individuals who aspire a 700+ score on the GMAT.

Prerak Gupta

I highly recommend Jamboree counselling if you want a hassle-free admission process in any abroad study. Mr Anmol Ahuja, the admission counsellor, helped me navigate the process from finalising the country and shortlisting the university to filling and submitting the application. Moreover, my editor Neha D helped me to great lengths in writing my SOP and LOR. Her quick turnaround time and language vocabulary make her highly recommendable. The overall experience was incredible; due to Jamboree, I could secure my seat in one of the most elite colleges. They will make sure you get your dream college.

Aarush Magan

A great place to get guidance and coaching regarding GRE. A good experience and the teachers are really helpful and are always available to help. The practice material provided is also really effective and helpful

Vedashree Bhide

It was a great experience, and the counselling was on point with University shortlisting and daily updates. The writer also did a wonderful job in giving a justice to the SOP and Resume. Very much recommended.

About Jamboree

Established in 1993 with a vision to make global education accessible, Jamboree Education has been pioneering international university admissions for 3 decades now. We’ve helped more than 200,000 students realise their dream of studying in prestigious colleges including Harvard, Stanford, MIT, Oxford, Yale and LBS.

Jamboree has earned the reputation as the go-to place for students aspiring to study at the top universities around the world. We understand that each student is unique, and our approach reflects this belief, ensuring that every student receives the attention and guidance they deserve.

From test prep and interview training to visa application and post-admission services, our comprehensive support eases the process of studying abroad for you.

This might take a few seconds, and while it does…

0

Fun Fact

Actress Kriti Sanon was a Jamboree student!

Jamboree is the official partner of ETS (the conducting body of GRE & TOEFL)!

Jamboree was started in a garage and is now spread across 32 centres!

Shantanu Naidu (GM, Tata Motors) was a Jamboree student!

Kriti Sanon scored 710 on the GMAT with Jamboree!

One in every two Jamboree students receives a scholarship or financial aid!
